sources.thomas_bulkowski: Encyclopedia of Candlestick Charts (103 patterns with statistical analysis)
sources.Author: Awase Khirni Syed
sources.Copyright: 2025-26 Beta ORI Inc. Canada. All Rights Reserved

metadata.disclaimer: Patterns are probabilistic tools. Always confirm with volume, trend context, and risk management. Past performance ≠ future results.

patterns.description: Small body near top, long lower shadow ≥2× body; appears after downtrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Downtrend reversal signal; indicates sellers exhausted, buyers absorbing pressure at support

patterns.description: Small body near bottom, long upper shadow ≥2× body; appears after downtrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Early bullish reversal attempt; buyers testing resistance after decline

patterns.description: Open/close at high, long lower shadow; T-shaped candle
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong rejection of lower prices at support; potential bullish reversal with confirmation

patterns.description: Very small body, long lower wick ≥2/3 of total range
patterns.scenario_when_used: Sharp rejection of lows in downtrend; high-probability reversal setup with volume confirmation

patterns.description: Long green body with no shadows; opens at low, closes at high
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bullish momentum continuation or reversal; buyers dominated entire session

patterns.description: Opens at low of session, closes near high with no lower shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong buying conviction at support; potential trend reversal after decline

patterns.description: Small body near top, long lower shadow ≥2× body; appears after uptrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Warning of distribution; buyers losing control after rally, potential bearish reversal

patterns.description: Small body near bottom, long upper shadow ≥2× body; appears after uptrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Rejection of higher prices at resistance; sellers overwhelming buyers after rally

patterns.description: Open/close at low, long upper shadow; inverted T-shape
patterns.scenario_when_used: Failed rally attempt at resistance; strong bearish reversal signal with confirmation

patterns.description: Small body, long upper wick ≥2/3 of total range
patterns.scenario_when_used: Sharp rejection of highs in uptrend; high-probability bearish reversal with volume

patterns.description: Long red body with no shadows; opens at high, closes at low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bearish momentum continuation or reversal; sellers dominated entire session

patterns.description: Opens at high of session, closes near low with no upper shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong selling conviction at resistance; potential trend reversal after rally

patterns.description: Open ≈ close, small/no body; shadows vary in length
patterns.scenario_when_used: Market indecision; requires context (support/resistance) to interpret as reversal signal

patterns.description: Doji with very long upper and lower shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme volatility and uncertainty; potential turning point after strong trend

patterns.description: Small body centered between roughly equal upper/lower shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Balance between buyers/sellers; consolidation or pause before next move

patterns.description: Small body with exceptionally long upper and lower shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: High volatility indecision; often precedes significant breakout or reversal

patterns.description: Red candle followed by larger green candle that fully engulfs prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Shift from sellers to buyers at support; strong bullish reversal with volume confirmation

patterns.description: Green candle followed by larger red candle that fully engulfs prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Shift from buyers to sellers at resistance; strong bearish reversal with volume

patterns.description: Long red candle followed by green candle closing >50% into prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish recovery after decline; buyers stepping in above midpoint of prior bearish candle

patterns.description: Long green candle followed by red candle closing below midpoint of prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish reversal warning; sellers overpowering buyers after rally

patterns.description: Large red candle followed by small green candle contained within prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential trend pause/reversal; selling pressure diminishing at support

patterns.description: Large green candle followed by small red candle contained within prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential top formation; buying pressure weakening at resistance

patterns.description: Large red candle followed by Doji contained within prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Stronger indecision signal than Harami; potential bullish reversal with confirmation

patterns.description: Large green candle followed by Doji contained within prior body
patterns.scenario_when_used: Stronger indecision signal; potential bearish reversal at resistance

patterns.description: Two candles with matching lows after downtrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Support confirmation; double test of lows suggests reversal potential

patterns.description: Two candles with matching highs after uptrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Resistance confirmation; double test of highs suggests reversal potential

patterns.description: Gap up with strong green candle after red candle; no overlap
patterns.scenario_when_used: Abrupt sentiment shift; strong bullish reversal with institutional participation

patterns.description: Gap down with strong red candle after green candle; no overlap
patterns.scenario_when_used: Abrupt bearish shift; strong reversal with heavy selling pressure

patterns.description: Red candle + small green candle closing near prior low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Weak bounce in downtrend; continuation likely unless confirmed by follow-through

patterns.description: Red candle + small green candle closing slightly above prior low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Marginal bullish sign; requires confirmation for reversal validity

patterns.description: Red candle + green candle closing above midpoint but below prior open
patterns.scenario_when_used: Moderate bullish attempt; needs third candle confirmation for reversal

patterns.description: Red candle + green candle closing at same level as red's close
patterns.scenario_when_used: Indecision with support test; potential reversal if followed by bullish confirmation

patterns.description: Two black bodies surrounding a white body with equal closing prices
patterns.scenario_when_used: Support level confirmation; bullish reversal probability increases at key levels

patterns.description: Long red → small body (gap) → long green; three-candle reversal
patterns.scenario_when_used: Classic bullish reversal trilogy; sellers exhausted, buyers taking control

patterns.description: Long green → small body (gap) → long red; three-candle reversal
patterns.scenario_when_used: Classic bearish reversal trilogy; buyers exhausted, sellers taking control

patterns.description: Long red → Doji (gap) → long green; variation of Morning Star
patterns.scenario_when_used: Stronger reversal signal due to Doji indecision; requires bullish confirmation

patterns.description: Long green → Doji (gap) → long red; variation of Evening Star
patterns.scenario_when_used: Stronger bearish signal due to Doji; confirms trend exhaustion at resistance

patterns.description: Three consecutive long green candles with higher closes and small shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong sustained buying pressure; bullish continuation or reversal after downtrend

patterns.description: Three consecutive long red candles with lower closes and small shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong sustained selling pressure; bearish continuation or reversal after uptrend

patterns.description: Red candle → gap-down Doji → gap-up green candle; rare reversal
patterns.scenario_when_used: High-probability bullish reversal; requires gaps on both sides of Doji

patterns.description: Green candle → gap-up Doji → gap-down red candle; rare reversal
patterns.scenario_when_used: High-probability bearish reversal; gaps confirm sentiment shift

patterns.description: Bullish Harami + third confirming green candle closing above first candle's high
patterns.scenario_when_used: Validated bullish reversal; confirms buyers have taken control

detection_rules.harami_setup: close[0]<open[0] and close[1]>open[1] and open[1]>close[0] and close[1]<open[0]

patterns.description: Bearish Harami + third confirming red candle closing below first candle's low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Validated bearish reversal; confirms sellers have taken control

detection_rules.harami_setup: close[0]>open[0] and close[1]<open[1] and open[1]<close[0] and close[1]>open[0]

patterns.description: Bullish Engulfing + third candle closing above first candle's high
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong confirmed bullish reversal; momentum accelerating upward

detection_rules.engulfing_setup: close[0]<open[0] and close[1]>open[1] and open[1]<=close[0] and close[1]>=open[0]

patterns.description: Bearish Engulfing + third candle closing below first candle's low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong confirmed bearish reversal; momentum accelerating downward

detection_rules.engulfing_setup: close[0]>open[0] and close[1]<open[1] and open[1]>=close[0] and close[1]<=open[0]

patterns.description: Long green + 3 small reds (within range) + long green; continuation pattern
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish trend pause; buyers regrouping before resuming uptrend

detection_rules.middle_contained: low[1]>=low[0] and high[1]<=high[0] and low[2]>=low[0] and high[2]<=high[0] and low[3]>=low[0] and high[3]<=high[0]

patterns.description: Long red + 3 small greens (within range) + long red; continuation pattern
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish trend pause; sellers regrouping before resuming downtrend

detection_rules.middle_contained: high[1]<=high[0] and low[1]>=low[0] and high[2]<=high[0] and low[2]>=low[0] and high[3]<=high[0] and low[3]>=low[0]

patterns.description: Long green + 3 small pullback candles + strong green close; continuation
patterns.scenario_when_used: Brief consolidation in uptrend; buyers maintaining control before next leg up

patterns.description: Long red + 3 small rally candles + strong red close; continuation
patterns.scenario_when_used: Brief consolidation in downtrend; sellers maintaining control before next leg down

patterns.description: Red candle followed by green candle opening at same price
patterns.scenario_when_used: Trend resumption signal; buyers stepping in at prior open level

patterns.description: Green candle followed by red candle opening at same price
patterns.scenario_when_used: Downtrend resumption; sellers stepping in at prior open level

patterns.description: Three red candles followed by one strong green engulfing all three
patterns.scenario_when_used: Reversal with momentum; buyers overwhelming sellers after extended decline

patterns.description: Three green candles followed by one strong red engulfing all three
patterns.scenario_when_used: Reversal with momentum; sellers overwhelming buyers after extended rally

patterns.description: Four-candle pattern in downtrend showing diminishing selling pressure; potential bullish turn
patterns.scenario_when_used: Diminishing selling pressure in downtrend; potential bullish reversal setup

detection_rules.all_bearish: close[0]<open[0] and close[1]<open[1] and close[2]<open[2] and close[3]<open[3]

patterns.description: Five-candle pattern with progressively higher lows; accumulation signal at bottom
patterns.scenario_when_used: Accumulation signal at bottom; gradual shift from sellers to buyers

detection_rules.candle5_strong_bullish: close[4] > open[4] and (close[4]-open[4]) >= 0.6*(high[4]-low[4]) and close[4] > high[2]

patterns.description: Green candle + gap-up red + second red closing lower but above first green's close
patterns.scenario_when_used: Failed breakout at resistance; bearish reversal warning despite gap

detection_rules.crows_pattern: open[2] > open[1] and close[2] < close[1] and close[2] > close[0]

patterns.description: Long red + gap down small green + third red closing below first red's close
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish continuation after brief pause; sellers maintaining control

patterns.description: Long green + gap up small red + third green closing above first green's close
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish continuation after brief pause; buyers maintaining control

patterns.description: Long red + gap down red + white candle closing in gap but not filling it
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish continuation; brief bounce fails to close gap, downtrend resumes

patterns.description: Long green + gap up green + black candle closing in gap but not filling it
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish continuation; brief pullback fails to close gap, uptrend resumes

patterns.description: Series of candles breaking out of consolidation with strong momentum candle
patterns.scenario_when_used: Trend initiation after range; buyers overwhelming sellers at breakout

patterns.description: Series of candles breaking down with strong bearish momentum candle
patterns.scenario_when_used: Trend initiation after range; sellers overwhelming buyers at breakdown

patterns.description: Three Doji candles in downtrend with gaps; rare reversal signal
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme indecision followed by resolution; high-probability bullish reversal

detection_rules.downtrend_context: close[0] < open[0] and close[1] < close[0] and close[2] > close[1]

patterns.description: Three Doji candles in uptrend with gaps; rare reversal signal
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme indecision followed by resolution; high-probability bearish reversal

detection_rules.uptrend_context: close[0] > open[0] and close[1] > close[0] and close[2] < close[1]

patterns.description: Three-candle pattern: long red, small red with lower low, long green closing above first red's open
patterns.scenario_when_used: Complex bullish reversal; confirms buyers have overwhelmed sellers

patterns.description: Three consecutive red candles with similar bodies and closes near lows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bearish continuation; persistent selling pressure with no relief

patterns.description: Three green candles with progressively smaller bodies and longer upper shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish momentum weakening; potential bearish reversal warning

patterns.description: Three green candles where third has small body and long upper shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Buying exhaustion at resistance; potential bearish reversal setup

patterns.description: Three green candles where third is small Doji-like candle after two strong greens
patterns.scenario_when_used: Uncertainty after rally; requires confirmation for next direction

patterns.description: Long-legged Doji with very long upper and lower shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme indecision at key levels; potential major reversal point

patterns.description: Long red candle followed by gap-down Doji
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential bullish reversal; indecision after decline requires confirmation

patterns.description: Long green candle followed by gap-up Doji
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential bearish reversal; indecision after rally requires confirmation

patterns.description: Doji followed by candle that gaps and closes beyond Doji's range
patterns.scenario_when_used: Resolution of indecision; direction of breakout determines signal

detection_rules.candle2_breakout: (open[1] > high[0] and close[1] > high[0]) or (open[1] < low[0] and close[1] < low[0])

patterns.description: Doji that gaps above prior candle's high
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish indecision at resistance; watch for follow-through direction

patterns.description: Doji that gaps below prior candle's low
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish indecision at support; watch for follow-through direction

patterns.description: Doji appearing at top of uptrend with long upper shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential bearish reversal warning; buyers losing momentum at resistance

patterns.description: Doji appearing at bottom of downtrend with long lower shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Potential bullish reversal warning; sellers losing momentum at support

patterns.description: Dragonfly Doji variant with very long lower shadow and tiny body at top
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong rejection of lows; high-probability bullish reversal at support

patterns.description: Two consecutive red candles closing at same price level
patterns.scenario_when_used: Support confirmation; double close at same low suggests reversal potential

patterns.description: Two small-bodied candles of opposite color contained within prior large candle
patterns.scenario_when_used: Consolidation after strong move; indecision before next directional move

detection_rules.contained: open[0]>=low[-1] and close[0]<=high[-1] and open[1]>=low[-1] and close[1]<=high[-1]

patterns.description: Two consecutive green candles with similar bodies after uptrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish continuation; steady buying pressure maintaining uptrend

patterns.description: Two consecutive red candles with similar bodies after downtrend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish continuation; steady selling pressure maintaining downtrend

patterns.description: Two consecutive red candles with gap down between them
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bearish momentum; sellers accelerating after gap confirmation

patterns.description: Green candle followed by two red candles where second red gaps up but closes lower
patterns.scenario_when_used: Failed breakout warning; bearish reversal potential at resistance

patterns.description: Bearish trend ends with bullish engulfing pattern at support
patterns.scenario_when_used: Final capitulation followed by strong buying; high-probability reversal

patterns.description: Bullish trend ends with bearish engulfing pattern at resistance
patterns.scenario_when_used: Final euphoria followed by strong selling; high-probability reversal

patterns.description: Three consecutive red candles with progressively smaller bodies and lower shadows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Selling exhaustion pattern; potential bullish reversal after extended decline

patterns.description: Shooting Star followed by bearish confirmation candle
patterns.scenario_when_used: Confirmed bearish reversal; sellers validating rejection of highs

patterns.description: Gap up between two candles with no overlap (Japanese 'window' = gap)
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bullish continuation signal; gap acts as support in uptrend

patterns.description: Gap down between two candles with no overlap
patterns.scenario_when_used: Bearish continuation signal; gap acts as resistance in downtrend

patterns.description: Eight consecutive candles making new highs/lows in strong trend
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme momentum continuation; caution for potential exhaustion reversal

detection_rules.consecutive_new_highs: close[7]>close[6] and close[6]>close[5] and close[5]>close[4] and close[4]>close[3] and close[3]>close[2] and close[2]>close[1] and close[1]>close[0]
detection_rules.or_consecutive_new_lows: close[7]<close[6] and close[6]<close[5] and close[5]<close[4] and close[4]<close[3] and close[3]<close[2] and close[2]<close[1] and close[1]<close[0]

patterns.description: Ten consecutive candles making new highs/lows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Very strong trend momentum; high probability of near-term pullback

detection_rules.consecutive_new_highs: all(close[i] > close[i-1] for i in range(1,10))
detection_rules.or_consecutive_new_lows: all(close[i] < close[i-1] for i in range(1,10))

patterns.description: Twelve consecutive candles making new highs/lows
patterns.scenario_when_used: Extreme trend exhaustion signal; high-probability reversal setup

detection_rules.consecutive_new_highs: all(close[i] > close[i-1] for i in range(1,12))
detection_rules.or_consecutive_new_lows: all(close[i] < close[i-1] for i in range(1,12))

patterns.description: Thirteen consecutive candles making new highs/lows (rare)
patterns.scenario_when_used: Maximum trend exhaustion; very high-probability reversal point

detection_rules.consecutive_new_highs: all(close[i] > close[i-1] for i in range(1,13))
detection_rules.or_consecutive_new_lows: all(close[i] < close[i-1] for i in range(1,13))

patterns.description: Red candle followed by green candle closing above midpoint but below prior open
patterns.scenario_when_used: Moderate bullish attempt; requires third candle confirmation for validity

patterns.description: Green candle followed by red candle closing below midpoint but above prior open
patterns.scenario_when_used: Moderate bearish attempt; requires third candle confirmation for validity

patterns.description: Exceptionally long green candle with large body relative to recent candles
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bullish momentum burst; continuation or reversal depending on context

patterns.description: Exceptionally long red candle with large body relative to recent candles
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong bearish momentum burst; continuation or reversal depending on context

patterns.description: Very small green candle indicating minimal price movement
patterns.scenario_when_used: Low volatility indecision; often precedes breakout or consolidation

patterns.description: Very small red candle indicating minimal price movement
patterns.scenario_when_used: Low volatility indecision; often precedes breakout or consolidation

patterns.description: White candle with no lower shadow (opens at low) but may have upper shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong opening buying pressure; bullish momentum with potential resistance test

patterns.description: Black candle with no upper shadow (opens at high) but may have lower shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong opening selling pressure; bearish momentum with potential support test

patterns.description: White candle with no upper shadow (closes at high) but may have lower shadow
patterns.scenario_when_used: Strong closing buying pressure; bullish conviction into session end

usage_guidelines.confirmation_required: Always wait for candle close and confirm with next candle before acting
usage_guidelines.volume_validation: Patterns with above-average volume have higher reliability
usage_guidelines.context_matters: Patterns at support/resistance levels are more significant than mid-trend
usage_guidelines.timeframe_hierarchy: Higher timeframe patterns (Daily/Weekly) outweigh lower timeframe signals
usage_guidelines.risk_management: Never risk more than 1-2% of capital per trade regardless of pattern confidence
usage_guidelines.backtesting_recommendation: Test patterns on historical data for your specific market before live trading
